name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late audits. We automate the extraction and formatting of vendor payment data instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: Manual data entry and formatting for quarterly audits is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual data entry and formatting for quarterly audits is time-consuming and error-prone.
